service:
AWS DevOps Agent is a frontier agent that resolves and proactively prevents incidents, continuously improving reliability and performance. AWS DevOps Agent investigates incidents and identifies operational improvements as an experienced DevOps engineer.

The agent works by:

  • Learning your resources and their relationships.
  • Working with your observability tools, runbooks, code repositories, and CI/CD pipelines.
  • Correlating telemetry, code, and deployment data to understand relationships between your application resources.
  • Supporting applications in multicloud and hybrid environments.

operations.AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResource: Authorize Ingestion Hub subscription operation. Looks to see if the derived accountId from FAS has an AgentSpace.
operations.AssociateService: Adds a specific service association to an AgentSpace. It overwrites the existing association of the same service. Returns 201 Created on success.
operations.CreateAgentSpace: Creates a new AgentSpace with the specified name and description. Duplicate space names are allowed.
operations.CreateBacklogTask: Creates a new backlog task in the specified agent space
operations.CreateChat: Creates a new chat execution in the specified agent space
operations.CreatePrivateConnection: Creates a Private Connection to a target resource.
operations.DeleteAgentSpace: Deletes an AgentSpace. This operation is idempotent and returns a 204 No Content response on success.
operations.DeletePrivateConnection: Deletes a Private Connection. The deletion is asynchronous and returns DELETE_IN_PROGRESS status.
operations.DescribePrivateConnection: Retrieves details of an existing Private Connection.
operations.DescribeSupportLevel: Describe the support level of a CloudSmith customer account.
operations.DisableOperatorApp: Disable the Operator App for the specified AgentSpace
operations.DisassociateService: Deletes a specific service association from an AgentSpace. This operation is idempotent and returns a 204 No Content response on success.
operations.EnableOperatorApp: Enable the Operator App to access the given AgentSpace
operations.EndChatForCase: End a chat session for a support case in the specified agent space
operations.GetAccountUsage: Retrieves monthly account usage metrics and limits for the AWS account.
operations.GetAgentSpace: Retrieves detailed information about a specific AgentSpace.
operations.GetAssociation: Retrieves given associations configured for a specific AgentSpace.
operations.GetBacklogTask: Gets a backlog task for the specified agent space and task id
operations.GetOperatorApp: Get the full auth configuration of operator including any enabled auth flow
operations.GetRecommendation: Retrieves a specific recommendation by its ID
operations.GetService: Retrieves given service by it's unique identifier
operations.InitiateChatForCase: Initiate a chat for support case in the specified agent space
operations.ListBacklogTasks: Lists backlog tasks in the specified agent space with optional filtering and sorting
operations.ListChats: Retrieves a paginated list of the user's recent chat executions
operations.ListGoals: Lists goals in the specified agent space with optional filtering
operations.ListJournalRecords: List journal records for a specific execution
operations.ListPendingMessages: List pending messages for a specific execution.
operations.ListPrivateConnections: Lists all Private Connections in the caller's account.
operations.ListRecommendations: Lists recommendations for the specified agent space
operations.ListServices: List a list of registered service on the account level.
operations.ListTagsForResource: Lists tags for the specified AWS DevOps Agent resource.
operations.SendMessage: Sends a chat message and streams the response for the specified agent space execution
operations.TagResource: Adds or overwrites tags for the specified AWS DevOps Agent resource.
operations.UntagResource: Removes tags from the specified AWS DevOps Agent resource.
operations.UpdateAgentSpace: Updates the information of an existing AgentSpace.
operations.UpdateAssociation: Partially updates the configuration of an existing service association for an AgentSpace. Present fields are fully replaced; absent fields are left unchanged. Returns 200 OK on success.
operations.UpdateOperatorAppIdpConfig: Update the external Identity Provider configuration for the Operator App
operations.UpdatePrivateConnectionCertificate: Updates the certificate associated with a Private Connection.
operations.UpdateRecommendation: Updates an existing recommendation with new content, status, or metadata
operations.ValidateAwsAssociations: Validates an aws association and set status and returns a 204 No Content response on success.

refs.MCPServerOAuth3LOConfig$scopes: OAuth scopes for 3LO authentication. The service will always request scope offline_access.
refs.MCPServerOAuthClientCredentialsConfig$sc: OAuth scopes for 3LO authentication. The service will always request scope offline_access.

SendMessageContentBlockDelta.base: Union of possible delta payloads within a content block delta event

SendMessageContentBlockDeltaEvent.base: Event emitted for each incremental content delta within a content block

refs.SendMessageEvents$contentBlockDelta: Emitted for each incremental content delta within a content block

SendMessageContentBlockStartEvent.base: Event emitted when a new content block starts

refs.SendMessageEvents$contentBlockStart: Emitted when a new content block starts

SendMessageContentBlockStopEvent.base: Event emitted when a content block is complete

refs.SendMessageEvents$contentBlockStop: Emitted when a content block is complete

SendMessageEvents.base:
Event stream for chat message responses using the content block model. Events follow a lifecycle: responseCreated -> responseInProgress -> (contentBlockStart/contentBlockDelta/contentBlockStop events) -> responseCompleted|responseFailed

SendMessage always uses content block mode — legacy per-field events (outputTextDelta, functionCallArgumentsDelta, etc.) are not emitted.

refs.SendMessageEvents$heartbeat: Heartbeat event sent periodically to keep the connection alive during idle periods

SendMessageRequest.base: Request structure for sending a chat message

SendMessageResponse.base: Response structure for sending chat message events

SendMessageResponseCompletedEvent.base: Event emitted when the response completes successfully

SendMessageResponseCreatedEvent.base: Event emitted when the response is created

SendMessageResponseInProgressEvent.base: Event emitted while the response is being generated

refs.SendMessageEvents$responseInProgress: Emitted while the response is being generated

refs.SendMessageEvents$summary: Emitted to provide a summary of agent actions

Service.base: Enumeration of all supported service types, combining OAuth 3-legged, client credentials, and simple token authentication methods.

refs.ListServicesInput$filterServiceType: Optional filter to list only services of a specific type.
refs.RegisteredService$serviceType: The service type e.g github or dynatrace

ServiceConfiguration.base: Union of all supported service configuration types. Each service has its own specific configuration structure.

refs.AssociateServiceInput$configuration: The configuration that directs how AgentSpace interacts with the given service.
refs.Association$configuration: The configuration that directs how AgentSpace interacts with the given service.
refs.UpdateAssociationInput$configuration: The configuration that directs how AgentSpace interacts with the given service. The entire configuration is replaced on update.

ServiceDetails.base: Union of service-specific configuration details for service registration.

refs.DeregisterServiceInput$serviceId: The service id to deregister. A service can only be deregistered if it is not associated with any AgentSpace.
refs.GetServiceInput$serviceId: The unique identifier of the given service.
refs.RegisterServiceOutput$serviceId: Service ID - present when registration is complete, absent when additional steps are required

ServiceName.base: The display name for a registered service.

refs.RegisterServiceInput$name: The display name for the service registration.
refs.RegisteredService$name: The display name of the registered service.

refs.ServiceNowConfiguration$authScopes: Scoped down authentication scopes for fine grained control

refs.ServiceNowOAuthClientCredentialsConfig$c: User friendly OAuth client name specified by end user.

refs.ServiceNowServiceDetails$authorizationCo: ServiceNow OAuth client credentials configuration. Use this when registering with OAuth client credentials flow.

ServiceQuotaExceededException.base: The request would exceed the service quota limit.

SlackChannel.base: Represents a Slack channel with its ID and optional name.

SlackTransmissionTarget.base: Defines Slack channels for different types of agent notifications.

SourceAwsConfiguration.base: Configuration for AWS source account integration. Note: passRole check on 'assumableRoleArn' is not supported.

refs.ServiceConfiguration$sourceAws: AWS source account configuration for monitoring resources.

refs.SourceAwsConfiguration$accountId: AWS Account Id corresponding to provided resources.

refs.AccessDeniedException$message: Detailed error message describing why access was denied.
refs.AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResourceInput$r: The ARN of the resource being authorized for vended log delivery.
refs.AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResourceInput$l: The type of log to be delivered.
refs.AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResourceOutput$: A message describing the result of the authorization operation.
refs.AzureConfiguration$subscriptionId: Azure subscription ID corresponding to provided resources.
refs.ChatParticipantConnection$initialContact: The identifier of the contact in this instance of Amazon Connect
refs.ChatParticipantConnection$participantTok: The token used by the chat participant to call CreateParticipantConnection
refs.EnableOperatorAppInput$idcInstanceArn: The IdC instance Arn used to create an IdC auth application
refs.EnableOperatorAppInput$issuerUrl: The OIDC issuer URL of the external Identity Provider
refs.EnableOperatorAppInput$provider: The Identity Provider name (e.g., Entra, Okta, Google)
refs.EndChatForCaseRequest$taskId: The unique identifier for the task execution to end
refs.EndChatForCaseRequest$reason: Reason for ending the chat session (optional, defaults to 'Chat Ended by CloudSmith')
refs.EndChatForCaseRequest$requester: Who initiated the chat end request (optional, defaults to 'CloudSmith')
refs.Execution$agentSpaceId: The unique identifier for the agent space containing this execution
refs.Execution$parentExecutionId: The identifier of the parent execution, if this is a child execution
refs.Execution$agentSubTask: The specific subtask being executed by the agent
refs.Execution$agentType: The type of agent that performed this execution.
refs.Execution$uid: The unique identifier for the user session associated with this execution
refs.GitLabDetails$groupId: Optional GitLab group ID for group-level access tokens
refs.Goal$agentSpaceArn: The unique identifier for the agent space containing this goal
refs.Goal$lastTaskId: ID of the most recent task associated with this goal
refs.Goal$lastSuccessfulTaskId: ID of the most recent successful task associated with this goal
refs.GoalContent$objectives: The objectives to be achieved for this goal.
refs.IamAuthConfiguration$operatorAppRoleArn: The IAM role end users assume to access AIDevOps APIs
refs.IdcAuthConfiguration$operatorAppRoleArn: The IAM role end users assume to access AIDevOps APIs
refs.IdcAuthConfiguration$idcInstanceArn: The IdC instance Arn used to create an IdC auth application
refs.IdcAuthConfiguration$idcApplicationArn: The IdC application Arn created for IdC auth
refs.IdentityCenterServiceException$message: Detailed error message describing why the call fails
refs.IdpAuthConfiguration$issuerUrl: The OIDC issuer URL of the external Identity Provider
refs.IdpAuthConfiguration$clientId: The OIDC client ID for the IdP application
refs.IdpAuthConfiguration$operatorAppRoleArn: The IAM role end users assume to access AIDevOps APIs
refs.IdpAuthConfiguration$provider: The Identity Provider name (e.g., Entra, Okta, Google)
refs.InvalidParameterException$message: Detailed error message describing which parameter is invalid and why.
refs.JournalRecord$agentSpaceId: The unique identifier for the agent space containing this record
refs.JournalRecord$executionId: The execution ID associated with this journal record
refs.JournalRecord$recordId: The unique identifier for this journal record
refs.ListBacklogTasksResponse$nextToken: Token for retrieving the next page of results, if more results are available
refs.ListChatsResponse$nextToken: Token for retrieving the next page of results
refs.ListExecutionsResponse$nextToken: Token for retrieving the next page of results, if available
refs.ListGoalsResponse$nextToken: Pagination token for the next set of results
refs.ListJournalRecordsRequest$recordType: Filter records by type (empty string returns all types)
refs.ListJournalRecordsResponse$nextToken: Token for retrieving the next page of results, if more results are available
refs.ListRecommendationsResponse$nextToken: Token for retrieving the next page of results, if more results are available
refs.OAuthAdditionalStepDetails$authorization: The URL to redirect the user to for OAuth authorization.
refs.PendingMessage$messageId: The unique identifier for this pending message.
refs.Recommendation$agentSpaceArn: ARN of the agent space this recommendation belongs to
refs.Recommendation$taskId: ID of the task that generated the recommendation
refs.Recommendation$goalId: ID of the goal this recommendation is associated with
refs.ReferenceOutput$referenceId: The unique identifier in the external system
refs.ReferenceOutput$referenceUrl: URL to access the reference in the external system
refs.RegisteredAzureDevOpsServiceDetails$orga: The Azure DevOps Organization name associated with the service.
refs.RegisteredGitLabServiceDetails$groupId: Optional GitLab group ID for group-level access tokens
refs.RegisteredGithubServiceDetails$targetUrl: The GitHub Enterprise Server instance URL (absent for github.com).
refs.RegisteredMCPServerDetails$apiKeyHeader: If the MCP server uses API key authentication, these details are provided.
refs.ResourceNotFoundException$message: Detailed error message describing which resource was not found.
refs.SendMessageContentBlockStartEvent$type: The type of content in this block
refs.SendMessageContentBlockStartEvent$parent: Optional parent block ID for nested content blocks (e.g. subagent tool calls)
refs.SendMessageContentBlockStopEvent$type: The type of content in this block
refs.SendMessageContext$currentPage: The current page or view the user is on
refs.SendMessageContext$lastMessage: The ID of the last message in the conversation
refs.SendMessageContext$userActionResponse: Response to a UI prompt (not a text conversation message)
refs.ServiceQuotaExceededException$message: Detailed error message describing which quota was exceeded.
refs.SourceAwsConfiguration$externalId: External ID for additional security when assuming the role. Used to prevent the confused deputy problem.
refs.Task$agentSpaceId: The unique identifier for the agent space containing this task
refs.Task$executionId: The execution ID associated with this task, if any
refs.Task$primaryTaskId: The task ID of the primary investigation this task is linked to
refs.Task$statusReason: Explanation for why the task status was changed (e.g., linked reason)
refs.ThrottlingException$message: Detailed error message describing the throttling condition.
refs.UpdateGoalRequest$goalId: The unique identifier of the goal to update
refs.UpdateRecommendationRequest$clientToken: A unique token that ensures idempotency of the request
refs.ValidationExceptionField$path: A JSONPointer expression to the structure member whose value failed to satisfy the modeled constraints.
refs.ValidationExceptionField$message: A detailed description of the validation failure.

SupportLevel.base: Represents a support level with all its properties and metadata

refs.AgentSpace$createdAt: The timestamp when the resource was created.
refs.AgentSpace$updatedAt: The timestamp when the resource was last updated.
refs.Association$createdAt: The timestamp when the resource was created.
refs.Association$updatedAt: The timestamp when the resource was last updated.
refs.CreatePrivateConnectionOutput$certificat: The expiry time of the certificate associated with the Private Connection. Only present when a certificate is associated.
refs.DescribePrivateConnectionOutput$certific: The expiry time of the certificate associated with the Private Connection. Only present when a certificate is associated.
refs.IamAuthConfiguration$createdAt: The timestamp when the Operator App IAM auth flow was enabled.
refs.IamAuthConfiguration$updatedAt: The timestamp when the Operator App IAM auth flow was updated.
refs.IdcAuthConfiguration$createdAt: The timestamp when the Operator App IdC auth flow was enabled.
refs.IdcAuthConfiguration$updatedAt: The timestamp when the Operator App IdC auth flow was updated.
refs.IdpAuthConfiguration$createdAt: The timestamp when the Operator App IdP auth flow was enabled.
refs.IdpAuthConfiguration$updatedAt: The timestamp when the Operator App IdP auth flow was updated.
refs.PrivateConnectionSummary$certificateExpi: The expiry time of the certificate associated with the Private Connection. Only present when a certificate is associated.
refs.UpdatePrivateConnectionCertificateOutput: The expiry time of the certificate associated with the Private Connection. Only present when a certificate is associated.

refs.TagResourceRequest$resourceArn: The ARN of the resource to tag.

refs.CreateAgentSpaceInput$tags: Tags to add to the AgentSpace at creation time.
refs.CreatePrivateConnectionInput$tags: Tags to add to the Private Connection at creation time.
refs.CreatePrivateConnectionOutput$tags: Tags associated with the created Private Connection.
refs.RegisterServiceInput$tags: Tags to add to the Service at registration time.

Task.base: Represents a backlog task with all its properties and metadata

TaskFilter.base: Filter criteria for listing backlog tasks, supporting time range, priority, status, and type filters.

refs.ListBacklogTasksRequest$filter:
Filter criteria to apply when listing tasks

Filtering restrictions:

  • Each filter field list is limited to a single value
  • Filtering by Priority and Status at the same time when not filtering by Type is not permitted
  • Timestamp filters (createdAfter, createdBefore) can be combined with other filters when not sorting by priority

refs.ListBacklogTasksRequest$sortField:
Field to sort by

Sorting restrictions:
  • Only sorting on createdAt is supported when using priority or status filters alone.
  • Sorting by priority is not supported when using Timestamp filters (createdAfter, createdBefore)

refs.ListBacklogTasksRequest$order: Sort order for the tasks based on sortField (default: DESC)

TaskStatus.base: Possible states of a task throughout its lifecycle

TaskType.base: Types of tasks that can be created in the backlog

ThrottlingException.base: The request was throttled due to too many requests. Please slow down and try again.

refs.ChatExecution$updatedAt: Timestamp when the chat was last updated
refs.ListPendingMessagesResponse$createdAt: Timestamp when the pending messages were created.

refs.UntagResourceRequest$resourceArn: The ARN of the resource to untag.

UpdateAgentSpaceInput.base: Input for updating an existing AgentSpace's properties. All fields except agentSpaceId are optional for partial updates.

UpdateAssociationInput.base: Input for updating an existing service association. Present fields are fully replaced; absent fields are left unchanged.

UpdateAssociationOutput.base: Output containing the updated association and optional webhook configuration.

UpdateOperatorAppIdpConfigInput.base: Input for updating the external Identity Provider configuration for the Operator App.

UpdatePrivateConnectionCertificateInput.base: Input for updating the certificate of a Private Connection.

UpdatePrivateConnectionCertificateOutput.base: Output containing the updated Private Connection summary.

UpdateRecommendationRequest.base: Request structure for updating an existing recommendation

UsageMetric.base: Represents a usage metric with its configured limit and current usage value.

refs.GetAccountUsageOutput$monthlyAccountInve: Monthly investigation hours usage and limit for an account
refs.GetAccountUsageOutput$monthlyAccountEval: Monthly evaluation hours usage and limit for an account
refs.GetAccountUsageOutput$monthlyAccountSyst: Monthly system learning hours usage and limit for an account

UserMessageBlock.base: A block of content in a user message.

UserReference.base: Reference to a user in the system

refs.JournalRecord$userReference: Reference to the user associated with this journal record

ValidateAwsAssociationsOutput.base: Empty Output for successful validating an aws association

ValidationException.base: A standard error for input validation failures. This should be thrown by services when a member of the input structure falls outside of the modeled or documented constraints.

ValidationExceptionField.base: Describes one specific validation failure for an input member.

refs.ValidationException$fieldList: A list of specific failures encountered while validating the input. A member can appear in this list more than once if it failed to satisfy multiple constraints.

ValidationStatus.base: Represents the validation state of an association.

refs.CreatePrivateConnectionOutput$vpcId: VPC identifier of the service-managed Resource Gateway. Only present for service-managed Private Connections.
refs.DescribePrivateConnectionOutput$vpcId: VPC identifier of the service-managed Resource Gateway. Only present for service-managed Private Connections.
refs.PrivateConnectionSummary$vpcId: VPC identifier of the service-managed Resource Gateway. Only present for service-managed Private Connections.
refs.ServiceManagedInput$vpcId: VPC to create the service-managed Resource Gateway in.
refs.UpdatePrivateConnectionCertificateOutput: VPC identifier of the service-managed Resource Gateway. Only present for service-managed Private Connections.

WebIdentityTokenAudienceList.base: List of audiences for Web Identity Token.

refs.RegisteredAzureIdentityDetails$webIdenti: The audiences for the Web Identity Token.

Webhook.base: Represents a complete Webhook with all its properties, and unique identifier.
